patents.title: Method of treating multiple myeloma using thalidomide
patents.abstract: A method of treating multiple myeloma by administering a therapeutically effective amount of thalidomide.

patents.title: Novel crystalline forms of thalidomide
patents.abstract: The invention relates to novel polymorphic forms of thalidomide and pharmaceutical compositions thereof.

patents.title: Thalidomide capsules for oral administration
patents.abstract: A hard gelatin capsule formulation containing thalidomide.
